appliedUpdates.description: Add GGUF export knowledge: TQ1_0 quantization type with QK_K=256 block size, automatic padding, BITNET architecture tensor naming conventions (token_embd, pos_embd, output, output_norm, blk.{i}.attn_*, blk.{i}.ffn_*), and model state dict key patterns (gamma for RMSNorm, weight for BitLinear/nn.Linear, router weights excluded from export).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify pathlib.Path convention: use pathlib.Path for internal file operations and paths managed by our codebase, but str is acceptable for external library interfaces (e.g., llama-cpp-python Llama class expects str for model_path). Config dataclasses may use str for fields passed to external libraries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both gguf-export and inference-evaluation features use str for model_path in config dataclasses because llama-cpp-python expects string paths, while internal file operations (save_results, load_results) correctly use pathlib.Path.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md conventions followed correctly (uv, ruff, ty, pytest, dataclass config, type annotations, CPU-only tests)
No new services or commands needed for inference-evaluation feature
rejectedObservations.reason: No action needed — existing services.yaml commands are sufficient
